Introducing SmolVLM-2: The Best Small Vision Language Model

We are excited to announce SmolVLM-2, a groundbreaking small vision language model that achieves state-of-the-art performance on multimodal benchmarks while being compact enough to run on edge devices.

SmolVLM-2 builds on the success of SmolVLM, incorporating a redesigned vision encoder and an improved language decoder. The model achieves 85.2% accuracy on the MMMU benchmark, surpassing much larger models like LLaVA-1.5-13B.

Key technical innovations include: (1) a unified patch-based vision tokenizer that reduces token count by 40%, (2) cross-attention fusion layers that efficiently combine visual and textual features, and (3) a 2-stage training pipeline using 15M image-text pairs followed by instruction tuning on 3M high-quality samples.

The 256M parameter variant runs at 45 tokens/second on a Raspberry Pi 5, making it practical for real-world deployment scenarios including robotics, autonomous vehicles, and mobile AI assistants.

We release SmolVLM-2 in three sizes: 256M, 512M, and 2B parameters, all available on HuggingFace Hub under the Apache 2.0 license.

HuggingFace Vision Team June 10, 2026
